source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for crisp creator-product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, large expressive headings, compact dashboard numerics, and readable multilingual controls.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, reef-current dividers, mandarin swirl texture bands, vivid token chips, analytics-heavy panels, and restrained luminous shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent Mandarin Fish motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated mandarin fish motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a single mandarin fish (Synchiropus splendidus) in clear side profile with accurate compact body, rounded fins, vivid blue maze-like swirls, electric orange bands, emerald green accents, turquoise highlights, fine scale texture, crisp fin edges, and natural reef-fish anatomy.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show full body, fins, tail, head, eye, and flowing pattern without cropping; slight graceful swimming curve, but no water or bubbles.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves saturated blue, orange, green, turquoise, and fine fish-skin texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the fish fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no coral, no lagoon, no rocks, no plants, no second fish, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Mandarin Fish" / "Mandarin Fish" as a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme reference.
Reference use: Use the transparent mandarin fish motif as the source of truth. Extract the vivid creator-system palette from the fish: saturated mandarin blue, electric turquoise, orange coral bands, lagoon green, lime glints, deep reef navy, soft reef paper, sand glaze, and muted kelp slate. The board must visibly respect the fish's blue-orange-green swirl pattern.
Canvas: exact 3840x2160, wide 16:9, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Layout: polished product design-system board with large readable labels, precise grid, no tiny dense token tables. Use 8px radii, reef-current curve dividers, mandarin swirl texture strips, crisp shadcn-style components, and a bright creative-tool dashboard mood.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Mandarin Fish", motif story, palette swatches with hex-like labels, English typography, Japanese typography, buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, slider, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dialog/popover, table, command/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard analytics, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, empty state, error state, loading skeleton, texture samples, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token chips, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use modern product UI font guidance similar to Geist plus Noto Sans JP.
Visual style: luminous but controlled light surfaces, reef-paper background, white cards with blue structure, orange primary calls to action, turquoise focus rings, lagoon-green success/support states, lime micro-highlights, deep navy text, subtle scale texture.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no stock UI kit, no random brand logos, no watermark, no illegible tiny text, no extra animals or fish as decorative subjects.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Mandarin Fish" / "Mandarin Fish" as a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible theme reference. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent mandarin fish motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve the light board's component coverage, product-dashboard layout, motif-derived palette roles, typography language, charts, token sections, and blue-orange-green swirl texture.
Canvas: exact 3840x2160, wide 16:9, high-resolution 4K-class source board.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Mandarin Fish", Dark Mode label, motif story, palette swatches with hex-like labels, English typography, Japanese typography, buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, slider, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dialog/popover, table, command/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard analytics, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, empty state, error state, loading skeleton, texture samples, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token chips, generated asset examples.
Visual details: deep reef navy and ink backgrounds, crisp luminous cards, mandarin blue and turquoise surfaces, orange coral primary actions, lagoon green support states, lime glint chart accents, pale reef text, subtle mandarin-fish scale texture overlays, 8px radii, fine borders, restrained contrast, polished creator-system dashboard feel.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use modern product UI font guidance similar to Geist plus Noto Sans JP.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon overload, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no stock UI kit, no random brand logos, no watermark, no illegible tiny text, no extra animals or fish as decorative subjects.
